note: DeepEval: 0.7-0.9 Spearman vs human (LLM-judge-based). Ragas: 0.65-0.85 for faithfulness/relevance. Sources: docs.deepeval.com (2024), arXiv:2309.15217 (2023). This measures BasicAccuracyEvaluator (Jaccard/exact) vs synthetic human scores. LLM-judge-based metrics expected to correlate significantly higher.
